title: ferray-window: f64-only — no f32 window generation
description:
Goal: 

Acceptance criteria:
- 

All window functions (bartlett, blackman, hamming, hanning, kaiser) return Array<f64, Ix1>. NumPy returns float64 by default but the window values could be generated as f32 for signal processing pipelines that work in f32. Not a direct NumPy gap (NumPy also defaults to f64) but a practical limitation for f32 workflows.
